title: Better Medicine
description: This mod adds numerous syringes for use in gunfight integration packs.
body:
This mod is designed for creating integrated packs for gunfights.
Compared to the Minecraft, it is still not considered complete, and no crafting recipes have been added.
Users are required to download the entire MCreator 2024.4 workspace from GitHub and make adjustments themselves.
(Currently, it is not possible to create new GitHub repositories within China, and therefore, downloading is not feasible.We will add synthesis tables in version 1.0.1)
This mod adds three types of potions:Epinephrine,Norepinephrine and Saturation Injection.
In addition to these, there are three types of syringes used for blood transfusion:Simple Syringe,Potent Injector and First-Aid Syringe.
This mod introduces two types of debuffs: bleeding and fracture.
You can eliminate them using Tactical Field Surgery Kit and Individual Combat Medic Kit.
**This mod made with MCreator!It can also be used in single-player mode.**
